The '''Imperial Repulsortank 1-M''' was a medium variant of the [[Imperial-class repulsortank|''Imperial''-class repulsortank]].

==Description==
Constructed by [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian Industries]], the 1-M was a limited production model of the [[Imperial-class repulsortank|''Imperial''-class repulsortank]], usually employed by [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenants]] in the field to command their units. It mounted a single [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] [[Mark 3/S Medium Blaster Cannon]] as its main weapon, with a [[Heavy repeating blaster/Legends|heavy repeating blaster]] to allow for protection from infantry. The limited armament also served to curb a maverick [[Officer/Legends|officer's]] impulse to seek out engagements. The 1-M was crewed by three tankers; a driver, a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]], and the commanding lieutenant. There was room for three passengers in the tank, usually the [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] [[Sergeant major/Legends|sergeant major]]. Like all ''Imperial''-class repulsortanks, the 1-M was built on the same 20.5 [[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long chassis and could reach speeds of up to 300 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]]. It had a cargo capacity of 250 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] and a ground clearance of two meters. 1-Ms cost 45,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. In addition, the 1-M carried the communications equipment necessary to allow the lieutenant to command his unit in the field.
